title: 出会いはトレンディー☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky and I are on our way home when we
pass a certain street.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Huh? Wait, is this place...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Can't you see, Trainer?! This spot...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Can't you see, Trainer?! This spot...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: This is where Eight Blossoms of Youth was filmed!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky catches me off guard with the name
of a classic TV show.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna lose it! This is totally the street corner
where Momotaro and Yoshimi reunite in the first
episode!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I never thought I'd stumble on the location of
such a cool, trendy TV show!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: We have to recreate the scene, Trainer! Come on!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: We have to recreate the scene, Trainer! Come on!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You play Momotaro, and I'll be Yoshimi!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: You play Momotaro, and I'll be Yoshimi!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: A few days after a totally bogus chance encounter, Yoshimi walks down the street and bumps into a certain someone...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
The two of them look at each other and shout,
"Ahh! You again!"

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Sigh... So cool and hip! Let's go, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She has sparkles in her eyes. I guess I have no
choice...
choice_data_list: Let's get this show on the road!
We should be respectful of their story.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Woo-hoo! ☆ I knew you'd be up for it!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Woo-hoo! ☆ I knew you'd be up for it!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I'll walk in from over there. Aaand action! ☆

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Ugh! If I ever see that guy again, I'm going to give
him a piece of my mi—

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oof! ☆

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: S-sorry! I was in a rush, and...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Wait, whaaat?! You again! From the other day!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
choice_data_list: Y-you again... from the other day!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oooh, that was so good! We recreated that
famous scene perfectly!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
This is so much fun! Now, let's go tour the other
locations!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I'll go get Tata! Be back in a flash!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We then travel around the city to each location
from the drama to recreate its famous scenes until
Maruzensky is satisfied.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: What do you mean?
choice_data_list: That tale belongs to Momotaro and Yoshimi.
That tale belongs to Momotaro and Yoshimi.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: ...Ahh, so that's it.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Their fateful rendezvous was for them alone. I
guess it would be rude to rewrite it.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Okay, let's stop here, then.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: ...Heehee.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: All right, Trainer, let's go!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: All right, Trainer, let's go!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: We're gonna find a cool, dramatic way for us to meet! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: We're gonna find a cool, dramatic way for us to meet! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh, c'mon! You didn't really think you could talk me out of it that easily, did you?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oh, c'mon! You didn't really think you could talk me out of it that easily, did you?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Your attempts at bargaining were cute and all,
but you're going to hurt my feelings!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
So as punishment, I won't let you go home until
the two of us create an exciting meet-cute fit for
the big screen! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Heehee! I'm counting on you! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I should've known it wouldn't be that easy...
